title: Fork-unlock: noStorage predicate for unmetered self-host
description: RelayManager needs a noStorage getter (returns false when metered===false) consumed by the per-folder sync toggle UI to replace the 'Buy storage' CTA when quota===0. See RECOVERY.md item 5.

title: Fork-unlock: leftRelayIds tracking + post-update() orphan sweep
description: RelayManager._handleEvent re-ingests relays after local cascade-delete. Original fork tracked left relay IDs to skip ingest, cleared on update(), and ran a cascade-delete of orphan shared folders post-update. Needs careful re-reading before reimplementation. See RECOVERY.md item 6.
